publishedAbstract: - When performing a capacity addition operation in ODF 4.11 cluster using LSO in an OCP cluster installed on top of a VMware cluster, a wrong and inactive Storage Class was selected, which caused the disks not being added to the cluster, and now the operation is in pending status.- When the correct Storage Class is selected and used, the OSDs are properly provisioned. Still, the failing ones remain in pending status, and even deleting the pods does not work, since the operator tries to recreate them again.- How is the proper way to cancel this wrong and pending operation?
publishedTitle: How to cancel a capacity addition operation on a wrong storage class via Local Storage Operator in OpenShift Data Foundation 4 that is in pending status?
